mapper.select: /*UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectUsimChangeMstList*/
/*UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectUsimChangeMstListExcel*/

/*UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectUsimChangeDtlList*/ SELECT MST.SEQ ,MST.REQ_QNTY || '-' || DTL.SUB_SEQ AS REQ_QNTY ,DTL.PRDT_CODE ,DTL.USIM_SN ,DTL.CONTRACT_NUM ,DTL.CHG_YN ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DTL.CHG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_DTTM ,SUB.ICC_ID ,DECODE(DTL.APPLY_RSLT_CD, NULL, NULL, '00', '성공', '실패') AS APPLY_RSLT_CD ,DTL.APPLY_RSLT_MSG FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_MCP MST ,NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_DTL@DL_MCP DTL ,MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO CUS ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE MST.SEQ = DTL.SEQ AND DTL.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND MST.CUSTOMER_ID = CUS.CUSTOMER_ID AND DTL.SEQ = #{seq} ORDER BY DTL.SUB_SEQ

/*UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectUsimChangeMstBySeq*/ SELECT SEQ AS seq ,STATUS AS status ,PROC_YN AS procYn ,DLVRY_TEL_FN || DLVRY_TEL_MN || DLVRY_TEL_RN AS dlvryTel ,TB_CD AS tbCd ,(SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'PERCEL' AND DTL_CD = TB_CD) AS tbNm ,DLVRY_NO AS dlvryNo FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_MCP WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
SELECT DTL_CD AS TB_CD FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'PERCEL' AND DTL_CD_NM = TRIM(#{tbNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT DTL_CD AS CHNL_CD FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'UsimReqChnlCd' AND DTL_CD_NM = TRIM(#{chnlNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0084' AND CD_DSC = TRIM(#{procYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

/*UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectUsimChangeChk*/ SELECT CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum, CHNL_CD AS chnlCd, REQ_QNTY AS reqQnty, DLVRY_NAME AS dlvryName, DLVRY_TEL_FN AS dlvryTelFn, DLVRY_TEL_MN AS dlvryTelMn, DLVRY_TEL_RN AS dlvryTelRn, DLVRY_POST AS dlvryPost, DLVRY_ADDR AS dlvryAddr, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS dlvryAddrDtl, DLVRY_MEMO AS dlvryMemo, TB_CD AS tbCd, DLVRY_NO AS dlvryNo, TO_CHAR(REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS reqInDay, PRDT_ID AS prdtId, PRDT_CODE AS prdtCode, USIM_SN AS usimSn FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_CHK@DL_MCP WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}

/*UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectSmsSendList*/ SELECT SEQ AS seq ,MST.DLVRY_TEL_FN || MST.DLVRY_TEL_MN || MST.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS dlvryTel ,MST.TB_CD AS tbCd ,(SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'PERCEL' AND DTL_CD = MST.TB_CD) AS tbNm ,MST.DLVRY_NO AS dlvryNo FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_MCP MST WHERE STATUS = 'REQ' AND TB_CD IS NOT NULL AND DLVRY_NO IS NOT NULL

/*UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectCustomerInfo*/ SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum ,SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo ,SUB.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId ,SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo ,SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS ctn ,CUS.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS customerLinkName ,NVL(SUB.USIM_TYPE, 'U') AS usimType ,SUB.SUB_STATUS AS subStatus ,BAN.BAN_ADR_ZIP AS dlvryPost ,BAN.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN AS dlvryAddr ,BAN.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS dlvryAddrDtl FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB ,MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO CUS ,MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO BAN WHERE SUB.CUSTOMER_ID = CUS.CUSTOMER_ID AND SUB.BAN = BAN.BAN AND CUS.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.CUSTOMER_ID = (SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND SUB_STATUS != 'C') ORDER BY CASE WHEN SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} THEN 0 -- 조회한 번호가 최우선 ELSE 1 END, SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE
/* UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectOsstNo */ SELECT SQ_FREE_USIM_OSST.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP AS osstNo FROM DUAL

/* UsimDlvryChangeMapper.selectUsimChgInfo */ SELECT MST.SEQ ,CUS.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME ,MST.CHNL_CD ,(SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'UsimReqChnlCd' AND DTL_CD = MST.CHNL_CD) AS CHNL_NM ,MST.DLVRY_NAME ,MST.DLVRY_TEL_FN ,MST.DLVRY_TEL_MN ,MST.DLVRY_TEL_RN ,MST.DLVRY_POST ,MST.DLVRY_ADDR ,MST.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,MST.DLVRY_MEMO ,MST.PROC_MEMO ,MST.PROC_YN ,TO_CHAR(MST.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY ,DTL.CONTRACT_NUM ,SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,DTL.PRE_CHK_RSLT_CD ,DTL.PRE_CHK_RSLT_MSG ,DTL.PRDT_CODE ,DTL.USIM_SN ,DECODE(DTL.NFC_USIM_YN, 'Y', 'NFC', 'N', '일반', '') AS NFC_USIM_TYPE ,DTL.USIM_MODEL_CD ,DTL.USIM_MODEL_ID FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_MCP MST ,NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_DTL@DL_MCP DTL ,MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO CUS ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE MST.SEQ = DTL.SEQ AND DTL.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND MST.CUSTOMER_ID = CUS.CUSTOMER_ID AND DTL.SEQ = #{seq} ORDER BY DTL.SUB_SEQ
